mapper.select:
SELECT et.id, et.exam_paper_id, et.exam_question_id, et.exam_paper_topic_number, et.exam_paper_topic_sequence, ep.exam_paper_name, eq.exam_question_name, eq.exam_question_types, et.exam_paper_topic_number, ep.kemu_types, ep.exam_paper_myscore, eq.exam_question_options, eq.difficulty_level, eq.knowledge_point FROM exam_paper_topic et LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON et.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON et.exam_question_id = eq.id
AND et.exam_paper_id = #{req.examPaperId}
AND ep.exam_paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.examPaperName}, '%')
AND eq.exam_question_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.examQuestionName}, '%')
ORDER BY eq.exam_question_types ASC, et.exam_paper_topic_sequence ASC

SELECT et.id, et.exam_paper_id, et.exam_question_id, et.exam_paper_topic_number, ep.exam_paper_name, eq.exam_question_name, eq.exam_question_types, et.exam_paper_topic_number, eq.exam_question_analysis, eq.exam_question_answer, ep.exam_paper_myscore, eq.difficulty_level, eq.knowledge_point FROM exam_paper_topic et LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON et.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON et.exam_question_id = eq.id WHERE et.id = #{id}

SELECT et.exam_paper_id, et.exam_question_id, ep.id, eq.exam_question_answer, eq.exam_question_types, et.exam_paper_topic_number, et.exam_paper_topic_sequence FROM exam_paper_topic et LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON et.exam_paper_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON et.exam_question_id = eq.id where et.exam_paper_id = #{req.examPaperId}
SELECT SUM(et.exam_paper_topic_number) AS total_score FROM exam_paper_topic et WHERE et.exam_paper_id= #{examPaperId}
